creator: bbtruk@users.sourceforge.net
text:
Created attachment 172944
Patch to version 0.7.3

Changes:
- Update to version 0.7.3. Changelog:
http://doublecmd.sourceforge.net/mantisbt/changelog_page.php?version_id=44
- Add missing direct dependencies (x11, cairo, gdkpixbuf2)
- Mark QT4 option as broken (seems some dependency in latest Lazarus is not compiled by default and Double Commander with QT4 it is not building anymore without it, not even older versions. The next version of Lazarus will probably fix it from what I have seen in the recent changes).


Tested with Poudriere (10x64, GTK2, QT4 - broken).
